name: Sure.jell® Strawberry Blueberry Jam
recipeInstructions: (Buy 3 pints of fully ripe strawberries and 2 pints of fully ripe blueberries.) Rinse clean plastic containers and lids in boiling water. Thoroughly crush strawberries, one layer at a time. Measure 2 1/2 cups into a large bowl. Thoroughly crush blueberries, one layer at a time. Measure 1 1/2 cups into the strawberries. Measure sugar into a separate bowl (scrape excess sugar from the cup with a spatula to level for exact measure). Mix 1/4 cup sugar from the measured amount and fruit pectin in a small bowl. Stir the fruit pectin mixture into the strawberries gradually. Let stand 30 minutes; stir occasionally. Gradually stir remaining sugar into the strawberry mixture until all is completely dissolved (about 3 minutes). Pour quickly into prepared containers, leaving at least 1/2 inch of space at the top. Wipe off any residue on the container tops; cover with lids. Allow to stand at room temperature for 24 hours. The jam is now ready to use. Store in the refrigerator up to 3 weeks or freeze extra containers for up to 1 year. Thaw frozen jam in the refrigerator before use.
